Nicole Kidman and Keith Urban's separation details emerge

Sources claim Keith Urban wanted to reconcile with Nicole Kidman after their separation. However, a source insists romance is off the table for the former couple, stating Nicole had already moved on.

What’s your take on Keith and Nicole’s situation?

youtube.title: Keith Urban Wanted Nicole Kidman Back After 2025 Split
youtube.description:
Keith Urban reportedly wanted to reconcile with Nicole Kidman following their 2025 separation. A source told OK! Magazine that Keith absolutely wanted Nicole back, but she had already moved on. The couple married in 2006 and had been living separately since the summer of 2025. A source insists romance is off the table for the former couple.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
